endpoints.name: Email Validation
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{YOUR_API_KEY_HERE}} with a real your_api_key_here. Replace {{USER_EMAIL_HERE}} with a real user_email_here.

endpoints.name: Phone Validation
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{YOUR_API_KEY_HERE}} with a real your_api_key_here. Replace {{USER_PHONE_HERE}} with a real user_phone_here.

endpoints.name: Malicious URL Scanner
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{YOUR_API_KEY_HERE}} with a real your_api_key_here. Replace {{URL_HERE}} with a real url_here.
